headline: Launch-facing copy is softer, clearer, and less internal across public support surfaces.
notes: Reworks the launch bar so it reads like a live preview layer instead of a raw internal beta notice, while keeping build notes and page feedback one tap away.
Polishes the feedback desk into a more public-facing page note surface with clearer handoff language and softer build-context framing.
Refines Build Notes wording so release helpers feel product-facing on Home, Magazine, My Trips, and support surfaces without losing operational clarity.
